idea-plugin.name: AI Test Case Generator
idea-plugin.description:
AI Test Case Generator creates comprehensive JUnit 5 unit tests for your Java methods using AI (Groq API).

How to use:
  • Place your caret inside any Java method
  • Right-click → Generate Unit Test with AI (or Alt+Insert)
  • Test file is created at the correct src/test/java/ path
What you get:
  • Happy path, edge case, and error case tests
  • Mockito mocks for dependencies
  • Descriptive @DisplayName annotations
  • Arrange-Act-Assert pattern
Configure your API key in Settings > Tools > AI Test Generator.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0 — Initial release
  • Generate JUnit 5 tests from any Java method
  • PSI-based context extraction (imports, fields, annotations, superclass, related types)
  • Groq API integration with configurable model and token limits
  • Automatic test file placement at conventional path
  • Clipboard fallback when file creation is not possible
  • Secure API key storage via IDE PasswordSafe

action.description: Generate unit tests for the selected method using Claude AI
